title: Truebit - Rekt
relevance_summary: Unchecked integer overflow leading to massive token minting and burning attack

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls Attack() function

red_flags: Bonding curve flagged as a 'rug zone'
summary: An attacker exploited an unchecked integer overflow in Truebit's proxy contract to mint and burn TRU tokens, draining 8,535 ETH. The attack was detected by security researchers who noted the function was named 'Attack'.
